listings.name: Groome Transport
listings.description: Stop paying for a billboard and start owning a location that serves as one! Strategically perched on Highway 34 with massive daily exposure to 30,000+ vehicles, this ±11,498 SF facility is a high-performance hub for your business. Featuring a 4-bay shop and a fully paved and securely gated 1.32-acre lot, it's built for heavy-duty work and total security.

listings.name: 201 Roberts Creek Rd. (Lot 3)
listings.description: 3 total lots available. Take advantage of major savings by purchasing all three for $799,900 — a savings of $75,000! Build your business in this central location in the heart of Green. Easy on and off I-5 access. Zoned (C-2) Community Commercial.

listings.name: 4807 SW Grange Rd. (Lot 2)
listings.description: 3 total lots available. Take advantage of major savings by purchasing all three for $799,900 — a savings of $75,000! Build your business in this central location in the heart of Green. Easy on and off I-5 access. General commercial zone (GC) accommodates a wide range of retail commercial uses.

listings.name: 4885 SW Grange Road (Lot 1)
listings.description: 3 total lots available. Take advantage of major savings by purchasing all three for $799,900 — a savings of $75,000! Build your business in this central location in the heart of Green. Easy on and off I-5 access. General commercial zone (GC) accommodates a wide range of retail commercial uses.

listings.name: Kammerer Industrial Park
listings.description: Rare industrial complex featuring 10 buildings, 1 residence and storage facility, located outside city limits on 22 acres. Long term tenants keep the units full. Plenty of room to expand. Low taxes (no city taxes), water supplied by 2 wells. 240 and 440 3-phase power present. Seller carry financing available.

listings.name: 520 SW 3rd Avenue
listings.description: With Downtown Mixed Use zoning, there's not much limiting you. DMU allows for medical or dental office, coffee shop, salon, boutique, CPA or attorney's firm. Full kitchen still intact as well as many private offices or work stations. Parking available next to building.

listings.name: Kammerer Industrial Park Bldg J North
listings.description: Industrial warehouse/flex space at the Kammerer Industrial Park, located outside city limits near Corvallis. Features 3 x 12' sliding doors and man door. Ideal for light manufacturing, storage, or flex industrial use.

listings.name: 2115 Pacific Blvd SW
listings.description: Community Commercial zoning means your business will probably work here! Join two national tenants in this high traffic Pacific Boulevard location near West Albany High School. Plenty of shared parking available. Owner will consider tenant improvements with long term tenancy.

listings.name: 108 Clover Leaf Loop
listings.description: High traffic location just off I-5 in Sutherlin. Located next to one of the largest Tesla charging stations in the valley — next to Subway, Starbucks, Taco Bell, Tractor Supply and more. Convenient and quick I-5 access.
